overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic city. The player character moves from a covered waterfront pier through neon-lit commercial streets lined with holographic advertisements and Japanese signage, eventually crossing a wet intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront walkway under industrial overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along a covered wooden pier walkway with teal accent lighting and yellow railings

entered.detail: large industrial concrete pillars supporting the overhead structure
yellow metal safety railing along the walkway edge
small teal-colored ground lights illuminating the wooden walkway
stacked metal barrels and industrial containers
lit vending machine against the wall

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a covered wooden pier walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. Teal pathway lights and yellow safety railings line the route, with industrial barrels and concrete pillars visible. The area is sheltered from the rain with artificial lighting dominating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront pier with city skyline view

events.description: exits covered structure onto open waterfront pier with city skyline visible
turns left along the waterfront to follow the pier path

agents.ego_description: reaching the end of the covered walkway and turning left to follow the waterfront pier

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscrapers with neon lighting and holographic displays
dark water reflecting the city lights
large floating holographic advertisement visible across the water

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens to a wide waterfront pier with panoramic views of a futuristic city skyline. Neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic billboards glow across the dark water. The camera turns left along the wooden pier, passing teal bollard lights and industrial barrels, with rain visible in the open air.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow neon-lit commercial street with Japanese signage

events.description: descends from waterfront to street level entering dense neon commercial district
rain creates reflective wet surfaces on the pavement

agents.ego_description: walking through the rain-soaked neon street passing pedestrians with umbrellas and browsing storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing red umbrella walking toward camera
pedestrian with purple umbrella passing by on the left

entered.detail: large blue neon hotel sign with Japanese characters
red neon sign reading 24時間営業 indicating 24-hour business
illuminated digital advertising display showing a woman's face
small trees in white planters along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow, rain-soaked commercial street lined with vibrant neon signs including a blue hotel sign and red 24-hour business signage. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk along the wet reflective pavement. Holographic advertising kiosks and Japanese lanterns illuminate the enclosed urban corridor as the camera moves through the sparse crowd.

events.description: approaches yellow striped crosswalk with red traffic light
crossing the wet street at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet asphalt street at the illuminated crosswalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella waiting at the crosswalk corner

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing
white and red striped road barrier
street corner cafe with illuminated red awning

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a street intersection with a prominent yellow striped crosswalk. The traffic light shows red as the camera crosses the wet asphalt. A cafe with a red awning sits on the corner, and a vehicle passes by on the right as the crossing completes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered industrial pier into the vibrant, rain-soaked heart of a neon-lit futuristic city. It begins along a covered wooden walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass, where teal pathway lights and yellow railings guide the way through a sheltered industrial zone. As the camera emerges from the cover, the scene opens onto a wide waterfront pier where the artificial lighting gives way to a panoramic skyline of glowing skyscrapers and holographic billboards reflecting across the dark, rainy water. The movement then shifts into a narrow commercial street, transitioning from the open pier to an enclosed urban corridor filled with vibrant blue and red neon signs, Japanese lanterns, and pedestrians with umbrellas. Finally, the camera moves through the sparse crowd toward a street intersection, crossing a yellow striped crosswalk on wet asphalt past a red-awning cafe as a vehicle passes by.
